nodes.name: Tax-loophole magnet webhook
nodes.notes: Path matches the form action hardcoded in STRManuals/site/src/pages/free.astro and STRManuals/site/src/components/EmailCapture.astro. Changing the path here requires a strmanuals rebuild + redeploy.

nodes.name: InfluencerSoft → AddUpdateLead (tax-explainer)
nodes.notes: Real IS API contract (mirrors STR_Stripe_InfluencerSoft_Tagger): POST form-urlencoded to /api/AddUpdateLead with rpsKey body param. Tags create the segmentation; an IS automation listening for `magnet:str-tax-loophole-explainer` drives the 4-email drip sequence.

nodes.name: Sheets → leads backup
nodes.notes: Safety net: even if IS or SMTP silently fail, the Sheet has every lead. Same Sheet ID as STR_Cluster_Lead_Router uses — single source of truth.

nodes.name: Respond 303 → /free?confirmed=1
nodes.notes: 303 (See Other) is the correct response after a successful form POST — converts the POST into a GET for the confirm page. The free.astro template reads `?confirmed=1` to render the 'check your inbox' state.

nodes.name: Respond 303 → /free?error=...
nodes.notes: Even on invalid input, send the user back to /free with an error param instead of showing them an n8n JSON blob. (free.astro doesn't render an error state yet — add `?error=invalid_email` handling there as a follow-up.)
